title: WEAVE compose() public API uptake witness (F-TP5-e) v1
description: Witness row capturing external uptake of weave_compose() public API (C0c gate, F-TP5-e). Source: f_tp5_e_uptake_enumerator.py grep over consumer repos. PASS when distinct_consumers >= 5 OR published_consumer_count >= 1. Reference: .roadmap.weave Falsifier preregister §F-TP5-e.

consumer_callsites.description: List of distinct callsites invoking weave_compose() across enumerated consumer roots.

consumer_root.description: Repo / module root path (relative or absolute).

file.description: Path to file containing the call.

snippet_hash.description: SHA-256[:16] of the call line for audit.

published_consumer_count.description: Subset of distinct_consumers that are published / external (non-hexa-bio-internal). PASS threshold >= 1.

overall_pass.description: OR-gate over criteria (per F-TP5-e: either threshold suffices).
